news.headline: Hundreds die crossing Mediterranean as 2026 already smashes records
news.summary:
The first two months of 2026 saw a record number of migrant deaths in the Mediterranean, despite fewer crossing attempts towards Europe, according to data from the International Organization for Migration (IOM).

news.headline: Strait of Hormuz blockage drives up Gulf food bills
news.summary:
<p>In a supermarket in Bahrain, Mahmoud Ali fills his cart as usual. The shelves remain stocked despite the war in the Middle East, but the blockade of the main shipping routes into the Gulf is now being felt at checkout.</p>
